Class Lives

java.lang.Object
game.Lives
public class Lives extends Object
Manages and displays the player's remaining lives.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Lives(Properties gameProps)
    Constructs the lives display using game properties.
